name: Bill Weld
subject: articles of impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22ffbCoi2w_B2S3RTuNKmizztwjH2KFjX68OmdwkNb4llIc_HgUgyaBoLAk4liLSF0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191210_fr_s&n=1) Today is a sad day. The House of Representatives has introduced two articles of impeachment against President Donald Trump, alleging he has committed _high crimes and misdemeanors_ in his dealings with the Ukrainian government. No matter your political affiliation, we can all agree that when politicians are accused of widespread corruption, it’s America that loses. Time and again, we hope that our elected officials will act in good faith with the interests of the American people at heart. But given President Trump’s behavior, it’s clear that his actions were never made in the good faith we deserve. That’s why it’s important that our system is resilient, and that good men and women are ready to stand tall when wrongdoing occurs. **We started this campaign because we believe that President Trump is unfit for office,****and that America deserves better****.** As more of his criminal activity comes to light, we’ll continue forward in the belief that we can restore America’s position as the shining city on a hill. [**Support our movement right now with a contribution of $20.20, $50, $100, or whatever you can today and help us step into the role that President Trump’s unethical conduct requires him to vacate.**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22ffbCoi2w_B2S3RTuNKmizztwjH2KFjX68OmdwkNb4llIc_HgUgyaBoLAk4liLSF0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191210_fr_s&n=2)**** | | [DONATE ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22ffbCoi2w_B2S3RTuNKmizztwjH2KFjX68OmdwkNb4llIc_HgUgyaBoLAk4liLSF0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191210_fr_s&n=3)
---
I promise that we’ll do everything we can to uphold the honor and ideals of our movement, the Republican Party, and the citizens of the United States of America.
\-- Bill Weld
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191210_fr_s&n=4).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191210_fr_s&n=5) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191210_fr_s&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191210_fr_s&n=7), software for leaders.

body:
We've spent the past year building a strong grassroots movement that's fighting for bold plans that will fundamentally change the lives of working people in our country. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b1c0/45c30650/112ee2391/66f8e67f/2989037845/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
[**December is our most important fundraising month yet. Can you please make your first donation today to ensure we enter 2020 strong?**](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM41F_EGR_GRM_P_20191210_V1S3_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode=EMM41F_EGR_GRM_P_20191210_V1S3_P_T2}) We've spent the past year building a strong grassroots movement that's fighting for bold plans that will fundamentally change the lives of working people in our country.

**We'll be honest with you -- we're in one of the most critical periods we will ever have on this campaign.** In a few weeks, people across the country will start getting out to caucus and vote for the bold plans we've been fighting for.

**Your support right now -- $2, $10, or whatever you can -- would be incredibly impactful before we enter this next phase of this election.**

We need to ramp up our organizing efforts in the weeks ahead, and grassroots donations are the only way we move this campaign forward. Elizabeth doesn't take a dime from Washington lobbyists, special interests, or PACs of any kind, and she doesn't host exclusive fundraising events to fund this campaign.

[**Can you make your first donation before the next FEC deadline? We're relying on donations from grassroots supporters like you to reach as many voters and caucus-goers as possible to win.**](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM41F_EGR_GRM_P_20191210_V1S3_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode=EMM41F_EGR_GRM_P_20191210_V1S3_P_T2) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

subject: Confirm your reservation

body:
| |
---
| Team,

We're emailing you to remind you that our Breakfast with Bennet contest closes at midnight **TOMORROW.**

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba967/134673f2/90625a3/6997b6f3/1602261380/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B2_121019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
If you need a refresher: We'll be flying one lucky winner and a friend to have breakfast with Michael on the campaign trail - all expenses paid! All you need to bring is a big appetite.

[What are you waiting for?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba967/134673f2/90625a3/6997b6f3/1602261380/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B2_121019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Chip in any amount - even $1 - and be entered to win!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba967/134673f2/90625a3/6997b6f3/1602261380/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B2_121019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

| [CHIP IN $29 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba967/134673f2/90625a3/6997b6f0/1602261380/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B2_121019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba967/134673f2/90625a3/6997b6f7/1602261380/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B2_121019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Michael can't wait to meet you!

- Bennet Campaign HQ
---

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by December 11, 2019 at 11:59 p.m. ET. Enter for free [here](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba967/134673f2/90625a3/6997b6f5/1602261380/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/breakfast-with-bennet-free"), or enter by contributing to Bennet for America by clicking [here](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba967/134673f2/90625a3/6997b6f3/1602261380/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B2_121019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000"). One (1) winner will receive the following Prize (the "Prize"): Two (2) roundtrip plane tickets to the breakfast location from within all fifty states, District of Columbia, or Puerto Rico; one (1) hotel room in the city of the breakfast location; two (2) breakfast meals. Approximate retail value of the prize: $1,500.

Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of fifty United States, the District of Columbia and Puerto Rico, and are 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to [Official Rules](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba967/134673f2/90625a3/6997b6f4/1602261380/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/breakfast-with-bennet-rules/") and additional restrictions on eligibility.

Sponsor: Bennet For America; PO Box 44494 Denver, CO 80202

subject: This weekend, we made history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI SLOAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is what momentum looks like: on Sunday, over 100 volunteers showed up to our canvass. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d743d035f76c/we-are-behind-by-76-donations-3811585?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | |
---
| | | ,
On Sunday we held the largest canvass in recent Texas history. Over 100 volunteers showed up to knock doors for the political revolution we’re building. **This campaign is truly about people over profits, which is why we don’t have support from corporate donors.** What we do have is grassroots supporters like you. [_Will you contribute to help us organize more people into this movement?_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=a9b92e0ab5&e=c169cb0a8e) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [Express Donate: $10](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=659d0ebfaa&e=c169cb0a8e "Express Donate: $10")
---
| [Express Donate: $25](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=03af43767c&e=c169cb0a8e "Express Donate: $25")
---
| [Express Donate: $45](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=8477a7d3ba&e=c169cb0a8e "Express Donate: $45")
---
| [Express Donate: $75](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=49bc1b0280&e=c169cb0a8e "Express Donate: $75")
---
| **For the next week we have a generous donor, who is a Medicare For All organizer here in Texas, agreeing to match every donation up to $2,000.** Your donation will count double, and will go to giving our volunteers the literature, water bottles and clipboards they need to go talk to our neighbors.
---
|
---
| [ DONATE ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=f5cf995a17&e=c169cb0a8e " DONATE ")
---
| We’re all in on this fight. Will you join us?

In solidarity,

Heidi
---

clean_body: This is what momentum looks like: on Sunday, over 100 volunteers showed up to our canvass. | | | | | | | | | | , On Sunday we held the largest canvass in recent Texas history. Over 100 volunteers showed up to knock doors for the political revolution we’re building. This campaign is truly about people over profits, which is why we don’t have support from corporate donors. What we do have is grassroots supporters like you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "Express Donate: $10" | "Express Donate: $25" | "Express Donate: $45" | "Express Donate: $75" | For the next week we have a generous donor, who is a Medicare For All organizer here in Texas, agreeing to match every donation up to $2,000. Your donation will count double, and will go to giving our volunteers the literature, water bottles and clipboards they need to go talk to our neighbors. | | " DONATE " | We’re all in on this fight. subject: Tom Steyer and Michael Bloomberg
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |

| Check out these numbers, team: Tom Steyer has spent _**over $79 million**_ on ads so far. Michael Bloomberg has spent _**almost $100 million**_ \-- in just two weeks! This may sound like a lot, and that's because it is. Especially when you consider that _all the other Democratic candidates combined have spent just**$28.3 million**_. **Team, it 's no secret that our campaign -- and the campaigns of candidates who are not self-funding their runs -- are being far outspent. Will you chip in to help us compete?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191210_BHQ_20191210-fr-BHQ-EM2-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

Here's what we know to be true -- **the more people know about Cory, the more they like him**. Now's the time to introduce more folks to Cory and our campaign by reaching Americans across the country.
**[Our campaign is working to get ads on TV, and we need $500,000 to do it. name: Team Kathy
subject: great news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
but we can't take anything for granted
|
---

| | **We have great news: Experts say Democrats could pick up AT LEAST two seats in North Carolina!** [_**Momentum is on our side, but we need to keep it up as we approach the first FEC deadline since Kathy announced she 's running for North Carolina's 6th. Will you make your first contribution and become a Founding Donor to our campaign?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3d6/3d199a51/2f22dc06/7364e589/2371630342/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZF9tIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191210?refcode=kme191210_nd_m_other&refcode2=17426") North Carolina's newly drawn maps put us in a strong position to win, but we can't take anything for granted. Republicans hold the vast majority of North Carolina's congressional seats. We need to win this seat if we're going to advance progress on key issues like education and health care, and we need to make sure we have the resources to lay the groundwork to victory. [_**We 've set a $50,000 FEC goal. It's a big number, we need to be prepared for outsiders to flood our race with huge sums of cash and lodge attacks against us. If you can, chip in and become a Founding Donor.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3d6/3d199a51/2f22dc06/7364e589/2371630342/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZF9tIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191210?refcode=kme191210_nd_m_other&refcode2=17426") After the FEC deadline, our numbers will go public, and potential challengers and special interests will look at our report to judge the viability of our campaign. We need a strong showing. [_**This is the first of many important benchmarks in our campaign. Let 's make sure we get off to a strong start. Make a contribution to our campaign today and become a Founding Donor -> **_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3d6/3d199a51/2f22dc06/7364e589/2371630342/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZF9tIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191210?refcode=kme191210_nd_m_other&refcode2=17426") Thanks, Team Kathy | | | [Donate](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3d6/3d199a51/2f22dc06/7364e589/2371630342/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZF9tIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191210?refcode=kme191210_nd_m_other&refcode2=17426")

name: Judicial appointment update via 314 Action Fund
subject: Friend, the people of Arizona deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| **Reason #1935 to defeat Martha McSally:** She voted to give a LIFETIME appointment to a judge who has an anti-healthcare record and who the American Bar Association declared was unqualified.

**Reason #1935 to support Mark Kelly:** Arizona deserves a Senator who believes in basic science and will enact policies that protect our planet.

[After this latest judicial appointment, our goal is to raise $15,000 to our Senate Battleground Fund in 24 hours. This money will go to Mark Kelly, who is working tirelessly to unseat McSally in 2020. Chip in $10 before midnight on Wednesday->](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_kelly19?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+After+this+latest+judicial+appointment+o&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_90DO_191210_2_2&source=314_EM_FR_90DO_191210_2_2&refcode=314_EM_FR_90DO_191210_2_2") | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: who goes first?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | **I just stepped off the stage at my First-In-The-Nation Town Hall in Iowa. ** I've questioned whether it's ideal for a country and a party that prides itself on its diversity to begin each presidential primary cycle in a state like Iowa that lacks such diversity. [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a5/3eb3e2fc/694d061c/744d1ed5/32321762/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191210_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191210_em_fr_b4_castro_all") Iowa has been going first for almost 50 years. In that time our country has changed dramatically. It's time our primary process changes with it. **Tonight, we brought Iowans together to talk about it. To ask tough questions. To share their concerns, and defend their first-in-the-nation status.** Not everyone agreed, but this conversation brought to light that many Iowans do. They just needed someone to say it first and start the discussion. That's what I did, and I will continue to speak up when others won't. [This campaign is about being bold enough to speak truths no matter what, and making sure we live our values. Help us continue to engage people across the country and build this grassroots campaign. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a5/3eb3e2fc/694d061c/744d1ed4/32321762/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a5/3eb3e2fc/694d061c/744d1eda/32321762/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191210_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191210_em_fr_b4_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a5/3eb3e2fc/694d061c/744d1ed9/32321762/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191210_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191210_em_fr_b4_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a5/3eb3e2fc/694d061c/744d1ed8/32321762/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191210_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191210_em_fr_b4_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Biggest Shame in American History
body:
Today's Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn't get further to the left, today's Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide. No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdujuiil-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdujuiil-kujkulhluu-r/) Friend,**This morning, Democrats made it official by announcing they intend to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump ... after finding ZERO evidence. **It is sad to see this hyper partisan abuse of the powers of Congress.Since his inauguration, the Democrats have been plotting to oust President Trump. These sham hearings are bad for our country and a distraction from the issues that hardworking Ohio families are counting on elected officials to address.**Watch what I had to say about the most recent sham hearings from the Democrats in an interview yesterday evening on "The Ingraham Angle" on Fox News Channel:** [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdujuiil-kujkulhluu-y/) Friend, the Democrats are making light of extraordinarily serious mechanisms reserved for the most grave threats to our democracy.We must unite to stop the radical left from their attempt to impeach President Trump. Because now, they're closer than ever. They know they can't beat him in 2020 and they will stop at nothing to try to remove him from office.Friend, the time to take a stand is now. [STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdujuiil-kujkulhluu-j/) We must stand together to protect our president against the attacks from the left!Steve Chabot | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdujuiil-kujkulhluu-t/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdujuiil-kujkulhluu-i/)

name: Senator Mike Braun
subject: Peter, Democrats have LOST it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
---
| |

# **DEMOCRATS SHAM IMPEACHMENT**
Peter, It's clear -- Democrats are unhinged. Today they unveiled their articles of impeachment against President Trump. Surrounded by her California and New York allies, Speaker Nancy Pelosi desperately attempted to explain the articles of impeachment to the American people. One thing is clear to me: [**Speaker Pelosi never wanted an outsider like President Trump, and Democrats have been trying to impeach him for two years.**](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdutlthk-ukvtrkydy-y/) [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdutlthk-ukvtrkydy-j/) But Democrats are going to fail when impeachment moves to the Senate. [**I look forward to arguing the facts of the case - not opinions and hearsay - in the Senate trial.**](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdutlthk-ukvtrkydy-t/) The fight is just beginning for us and President Trump. Thank you for standing with us. [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdutlthk-ukvtrkydy-i/) |
---|---|---

[mikebraunforindiana.com](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdutlthk-ukvtrkydy-d/)

[](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdutlthk-ukvtrkydy-h/) [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdutlthk-ukvtrkydy-u/) [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdutlthk-ukvtrkydy-o/)

You're receiving this email because you subscribed via our [web site](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdutlthk-ukvtrkydy-b/), or donated to our campaign
but you may [unsubscribe](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-u-jdutlthk-ukvtrkydy-r/) if you're no longer interested.

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Tim isn’t sitting quietly on the sidelines
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, I'm proud to call Tim Walz a friend. He has dedicated his life to public service -- as a teacher, veteran, member of Congress and now as our governor. Tim leads with optimism and sees the best in people, but he isn't afraid to stand firm in his convictions. He always puts Minnesotans first and he follows through on this promise. Peter Willis , With the Democrats unveiling two articles of impeachment against President Trump yesterday, it is more clear than ever that the far left is driving the House Democrats' agenda. **We could have done a lot of good for the American people this year, but the Democrats chose to waste their time on a divisive and partisan impeachment process instead. ** Understand, what they are really saying here is Congress should decide who your next President will be. Despite Oklahomans overwhelmingly voting for President Trump in 2016, they want to reverse that decision. **I resent that, and it 's why I need your help. ** [Will you chip in $5, $10, or $15 today to help send an ally of President back to Congress in 2020?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/KJ0WcH7637oL3892L5MSuDlzmQ/84IM8fkFsW3nfsRQPYhdBw/Pba9s50YdLjLCjv6VeGAbA)

body:
We know that some candidates are spending big money to spread their message.
| | |

| Team, Just yesterday, Andrew Yang qualified for the December debate. He will join Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, Amy Klobuchar, and Tom Steyer on stage. We know that some candidates are spending big money to spread their message, some with almost nine-figure ad buys to flood the airwaves and gain support in the polls. **Here 's what we know: this race is far from decided. The large majority of voters and caucus-goers are still either undecided or not committed to their current first choice candidate.**
That's why we're launching ads in the early states to introduce more folks to Cory and our campaign. With the deadline to qualify for the December debate in less than 48 hours, and it is likely that the DNC will raise the threshold for the January debate as well, we need to act fast.
**[So will you chip in to help fund our ads? Anything you can give will help spread Cory's message with key voters and caucus-goers.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191211_BHQ_20191211-fr-BHQ-EM1-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

clean_body: We know that some candidates are spending big money to spread their message. | | | | Team, Just yesterday, Andrew Yang qualified for the December debate. He will join Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, Amy Klobuchar, and Tom Steyer on stage. We know that some candidates are spending big money to spread their message, some with almost nine-figure ad buys to flood the airwaves and gain support in the polls. If we want to stay competitive in this race, team, we're going to need to start running TV ads. Will you help us fund more ads to reach a broader audience in the early states? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Here 's what we know: this race is far from decided. The large majority of voters and caucus-goers are still either undecided or not committed to their current first choice candidate. That's why we're launching ads in the early states to introduce more folks to Cory and our campaign. With the deadline to qualify for the December debate in less than 48 hours, and it is likely that the DNC will raise the threshold for the January debate as well, we need to act fast. name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Here's the deal:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
The most important race happening in 2020 is for control of the Senate.
| | |
---
I will not be the first, nor will I be the last to tell you this, friends: **The most important race happening in 2020 is for control of the Senate.**
I have a front-row seat to the damage Mitch McConnell is causing in the Senate. He is blocking every last attempt at progress that our Democratic colleagues in the House are fighting so hard for - environmental protections, gun safety measures, affordable healthcare. **If a Democrat wins the White House, they MUST have the Senate as well. **
That's why I'm reaching out to you about Gary Peters' race in Michigan. Experts from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call say Democrats can win back the Senate - **_but only if Gary wins in Michigan. _**
The thing is that Gary's reelection won't be easy. He's one of two Democratic Senate candidates fighting to win in a state President Trump carried. To top it all off, Gary is winning by just one point - 44% to 43% - over his hard-right opponent, handpicked by Trump and McConnell.
**So here's the deal: I told Gary I'd help him raise $5,500 to protect Michigan's Democratic Senate seat, and we really need to hit that goal before midnight. Can I count on you to give now and help us take back the Senate majority? **
**[Please, click here to give $5 or more to help Gary Peters keep Michigan blue, defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daac9/5721a3ed/71a5f4d5/efaafd5/2408178316/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNTgtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk158-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk158-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=5")** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk158-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=25")** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk158-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daac9/5721a3ed/71a5f4d5/efaafd5/2408178316/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNTgtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk158-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
The path to taking back the Senate for Democrats is a tough one. But it runs straight through Michigan, and that's why we need to make supporting Gary a priority. I appreciate you stepping up and being a part of this fight.

Chuck

**Last night, in a moment of political desperation, Scott Perry joined President Trump on stage at his campaign rally. Having been consistently named one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress, Perry knows he’s in trouble. So despite refusing to meet with his constituents, he found the time to cozy up to his party boss.**

Last night’s rally made it clear that Washington Republicans are desperate to save Scott Perry and are willing to pull out all of the stops -- including a presidential rally and a Mike Pence bus tour -- to keep PA-10 red.

**The reality is, Scott Perry is just too radical for this district. He proved it by standing by the president’s side last night, cheering his health care and tax policies that continue to hurt South Central Pennsylvanians.**

[**Eugene has a proven track record as Auditor General of fighting for Pennsylvanians, rooting out corruption, and offering thoughtful solutions to complicated issues to improve the lives of people across our state. clean_body: = Team, Last night, in a moment of political desperation, Scott Perry joined President Trump on stage at his campaign rally. Having been consistently named one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress, Perry knows he’s in trouble. So despite refusing to meet with his constituents, he found the time to cozy up to his party boss. Last night’s rally made it clear that Washington Republicans are desperate to save Scott Perry and are willing to pull out all of the stops -- including a presidential rally and a Mike Pence bus tour -- to keep PA-10 red. The reality is, Scott Perry is just too radical for this district. He proved it by standing by the president’s side last night, cheering his health care and tax policies that continue to hurt South Central Pennsylvanians. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Congress needs more leaders like Eugene who have a proven track record of putting partisan politics aside to actually get things done for the people whom they are elected to represent. It’s time to put an end to the iron grip of special interest groups on our district and put the interests of hard-working Pennsylvanians first. Thanks for your support, Team Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. body:

Mike Turner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Your chance to volunteer is here!
body:
Good morning Peter!
With the holidays just around the corner, it is more important than ever that we keep people engaged and aware of Marc and his values. The municipal runoff is drawing to a close, and it is almost time to focus all energy on the 2020 primary.

This is why we need your help to reach out to voters in our phone banks and block walks, so they remember who Marc is, and why he is the best choice for District 18. Come out tonight, or any Wednesday, at 5:30 (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/170645/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b08a16788e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_02_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b08a16788e-32267927) , to help us reach voters.
Make calls with us! (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/170645/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b08a16788e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_02_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b08a16788e-32267927)
Every Saturday, we target a different area of the district to meet voters. Although we have canvassed more than 8,000 people since the start of the campaign, we need your help to reach many more. Sign up today (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/171484/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b08a16788e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_02_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b08a16788e-32267927) to help us reach 10,000!
We know people cannot always find the time to volunteer, so please consider making a donation (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b08a16788e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_02_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b08a16788e-32267927) so we can reach our fundraising goals by the end of the year!
Donate today! (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b08a16788e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_02_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b08a16788e-32267927)
We appreciate your continued support!

Marc

As Dan stays busy fighting for the Third District in Congress and our campaign operations heat up locally, we wanted to catch you up on what Team Lipinski has been up to for the past few weeks. Take a look!

* * *
**_IN THE DISTRICT_**
The residents of the Third District are always generous with their time and talent, particularly during the Christmas holiday season when so many are in need of a helping hand. Dan was proud to participate alongside other volunteers at the St. John of the Cross’ Annual Food Collection Drive.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12764041/131690341/-1768996671?refcode=DL_EM_EN_90DO_191211_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDQ5ZjJlYS01NzFjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HvlyTKh_-flNnP8vbknqRWbAVI5yiJVRuvuIljuPCW4=)

* * *

Thank you to all the supporters who came out to our annual Christmas Party! With our hectic schedule in Washington, we had to have our Christmas party earlier than usual this year. Nevertheless, it was a great time! Special thanks to Jim Connolly for the rousing intro!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12764045/131690345/-1768996671?refcode=DL_EM_EN_90DO_191211_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDQ5ZjJlYS01NzFjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HvlyTKh_-flNnP8vbknqRWbAVI5yiJVRuvuIljuPCW4=)

Hi Friend, **** **Here’s the good news:** everyone’s buzzing with excitement about the idea of electing a real, progressive champion to represent New York’s 17th. Every town hall, event, and meeting we attend people tell us the same thing — _something needs to change._ They know that out of anyone in this race, Mondaire is by far the most committed to fighting for that big, bold change. **But here’s the bad news: all of this momentum we’re feeling right now is in danger.** A billionaire’s son recently joined the race and 2 new candidates joined last week. They could easily flood this race with millions in personal wealth and drown out Mondaire’s message. _Big money from corporate PACs and special interests is the biggest challenge progressive candidates all across the country face and why most candidates are forced to drop out._ **We can’t let this happen to Mondaire.****[We’re not asking for a lot: will you donate even just $5 to help **** When more candidates jump into the race, it greatly affects our campaign’s strategy and how much more we have to do to make sure Mondaire’s name and story stands out from the crowd. We sure don’t have millions in our personal bank accounts to draw from, but we have a hardworking and scrappy team that’s fighting to make the best with what we have. **If we receive a couple extra bucks more than we usually raise from emails like this,****_it would open up huge opportunities for our team._** **_→_** We could hire new team members who can help us train volunteers, expand our organizing efforts, plan more events with Mondaire, and come up with more creative ways to spread Mondaire’s message. **_→_** We could invest more money into media projects like the video ad we clean_body: Big money from corporate PACs and special interests is the biggest challenge progressive candidates all across the country face and why most candidates are forced to drop out. | | | Hi Friend, ** Here’s the good news: everyone’s buzzing with excitement about the idea of electing a real, progressive champion to represent New York’s 17th. Every town hall, event, and meeting we attend people tell us the same thing — something needs to change. They know that out of anyone in this race, Mondaire is by far the most committed to fighting for that big, bold change. But here’s the bad news: all of this momentum we’re feeling right now is in danger. A billionaire’s son recently joined the race and 2 new candidates joined last week. They could easily flood this race with millions in personal wealth and drown out Mondaire’s message. Big money from corporate PACs and special interests is the biggest challenge progressive candidates all across the country face and why most candidates are forced to drop out. We can’t let this happen to Mondaire.** ** When more candidates jump into the race, it greatly affects our campaign’s strategy and how much more we have to do to make sure Mondaire’s name and story stands out from the crowd. We sure don’t have millions in our personal bank accounts to draw from, but we have a hardworking and scrappy team that’s fighting to make the best with what we have. If we receive a couple extra bucks more than we usually raise from emails like this,**it would open up huge opportunities for our team. → We could hire new team members who can help us train volunteers, expand our organizing efforts, plan more events with Mondaire, and come up with more creative ways to spread Mondaire’s message. → We could invest more money into media projects like the video ad we recently released and social media ads. → We could print out more fliers about Mondaire & the race and produce more yard signs to hand out. Getting money for any of these plans would give us a huge boost in this competitive primary. The average donation to our last email was $9.36. ** ** Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

name: Sara 2020
subject: [BUMP] Today, the Supreme Court upheld a law requiring abortion providers to perform an ultrasound and show it to the patient AND play an audio of the fetal heartbeat.
body:
Did you miss this news?

Hi -- Did you miss this news?
The Supreme Court upheld a cruel and invasive mandatory ultrasound law, thanks to Susan Collins' critical vote to confirm anti-choice Brett Kavanaugh.
**If you 're ready to replace Susan Collins in the Senate, chip in at this link:**
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/Kavanaugh](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fc4/4bef7a87/6a702258/287fee5e/3427066332/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTEtMy1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191211-3-a")**
\-------_Original Message_ \-------
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fc4/4bef7a87/6a702258/287fee5e/3427066332/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTEtMy1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191211-3-a")
Friends,
Today, the Supreme Court upheld a law requiring Kentucky abortion providers to perform an ultrasound, show it to the patient no matter their wishes, AND play audio of the fetal heartbeat. No exceptions, _not even for cases of rape and incest_.
It's simply cruel. And it happened because anti-choice justices now have a 5-4 majority, thanks to Susan Collins' critical vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh.
**Despite Kavanaugh 's far-right rulings, Collins still says she doesn't regret her vote to confirm him. If you chip in now, we can make sure we replace her in the Senate:**
**[Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign for U.S. Senate right away. If you give now, we will defeat Susan Collins.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fc4/4bef7a87/6a702258/287fee5e/3427066332/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTEtMy1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191211-3-a")**
Thanks for your fight,
\- Team Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fc4/4bef7a87/6a702258/287fee5e/3427066332/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTEtMy1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191211-3-a")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fc4/4bef7a87/6a702258/287fee5d/3427066332/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fc4/4bef7a87/6a702258/287fee5c/3427066332/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Nancy Pelosi: Donald Trump "is a continuing threat to our democracy and national security"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | You heard it right, Peter. Our president is a threat to our democracy. That's why House Democrats presented two articles of impeachment charging the president with abuse of power and obstruction of Congress. The GOP doesn't seem to see it that way. They either think that everything Trump does is divinely inspired or they're just yelling and screaming about anything but the truth to deliberately confuse the public because they're desperate to hold on to power. Speaker Pelosi is leading the charge against the White House and Republican obstruction and criminal behavior, but she can't be the only one. Engaged Democrats across the country need to have her back as we head into 2020 and work to kick the racist criminal Cheeto out of the White House. We need to hear from you today: **Do you support Nancy Pelosi?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcad/6e9863e8/170a9b2e/1db0b54c/3468193479/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/e7Ohykhd") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcad/6e9863e8/170a9b2e/1db0b54c/3468193479/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/e7Ohykhd") Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcad/6e9863e8/170a9b2e/1db0b553/3468193479/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191211a.ND&refcode2=fE0hpQnpgkEWHEynPoia")

body:
---
| | [_For the first time in this entire race, Republicans just went live with expensive TV attacks to defeat me and sabotage our historic shot to win the Senate. I need 2,500 gifts to launch an IMMEDIATE response and defend this critical seat. Will you rush $5? >>_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191211_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") My heart just dropped into my stomach: For the first time in this entire race -- **Republicans just went live with expensive TV ads to defeat me.** They know if I lose this race, Democrats' entire shot to flip McConnell's Senate will be over and done. I won't have it. I'm launching an immediate counter. I need 2,500 Democrats to have my back and fight this with me. Please, will you rush $5 to WIN this race and WIN the Senate? | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191211_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191211_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

Thank you,

Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7b9/18e32a7f/5052031f/7b22a14d/267661802/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7b9/18e32a7f/5052031f/7b22a142/267661802/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7b9/18e32a7f/5052031f/7b22a143/267661802/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7b9/18e32a7f/5052031f/7b22a140/267661802/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7b9/18e32a7f/5052031f/7b22a141/267661802/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7b9/18e32a7f/5052031f/7b22a146/267661802/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| Hi friend,

Before we leap into 2020, I wanted to take a minute to get some feedback from you!

I decided to run for Congress to fight for the needs of our community and be your voice in Washington. While I have a lot of ideas about what our biggest priorities should be, I want to hear your thoughts as well.

Using your responses, my team and I will continue building a campaign representative of our community and its goals for progress. **What issues should we focus our campaign on in 2020?** | [Job growth and economic

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Washington or Trump?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
There’s a painting that hangs in the Capitol rotunda depicting General
George Washington in front of the Continental Congress 236 years ago,
resigning his commission as the commander-in-chief of the Continental
Army.

The artist, John Trumbull, believed that it illustrated “one of the
highest moral lessons ever given to the world.”

Why?

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Because here was a man at the height of his powers, a man who had led
America to a stunning defeat of the most powerful military on the planet,
a man who could have made the case to be commander for life, or even King,
a case that would have resonated with many in a young, unstable country
still not free from the military threat of Great Britain or foreign
interference in our affairs... who nonetheless voluntarily resigned his
commission and gave up his power.

He did it for the greater good of this nascent democracy and in support of
the idea that no man is above the law or the will of the people as
expressed through their elected representatives.

He knew that if this great experiment, this profound idea of America, was
going to work, then at this decisive moment he must set the example.

And though he failed abjectly in other defining moral tests — he owned
enslaved people, failed to work for the abolition of slavery, and in so
doing set a perverse example and standard that would require a civil war
to overcome — this precedent that personal ambition would be subjugated to
the interests of the republic allowed us to inherit a government, as John
Adams described it, “of laws, not of men.”

This precedent also helped to inspire a Constitution that provides
protection against those who would put their own interests ahead of the
country’s, including provision for impeachment of the commander-in-chief
should they abuse the power of their office.

The idea of self-government and the Constitution that guarantees it were
fought for and defended by succeeding generations of Americans. The
service members who lost their lives in the Civil War, and in the World
Wars that followed, paid the ultimate price to see this idea through. So
did the civil rights marchers, the freedom riders, the men and women and
even children who forced this country to move closer to realizing it for
everyone by adopting the Civil Rights Act and the Voting Rights Act in
1964 and 1965.

We have inherited the service and sacrifice of those who came before us.
What we choose to do with this inheritance will define us for future
generations and will be the example we pass on to our children and
grandchildren.

Which brings us to this moment and the choice we have before us.

We now have a President who has abused his office and the public trust to
pursue personal and political gain. We have a President who has defied the
government of the people, obstructed the pursuit of justice, and welcomed
foreign interference into the most sacred aspect of self-government, our
elections.

We also have a Congress that has introduced articles of impeachment to
hold him accountable.

Here is the challenge, and ultimately, the choice.

Despite his flagrant abuse of the public trust (none of the key facts are
in dispute, in part because he has so openly flouted the law and the
constitution), Donald Trump has faced no consequences from his own
political party. Like a cult of personality, Republican members of
Congress have prioritized their leader over their country and their oath
to defend the Constitution.

But surely those who support President Trump’s defiance of our
institutions, of the Constitution, of the rule of law; who turn a blind
eye to the facts in order to focus on partisan advantage and short term
political gain; who operate in fear for their political careers at the
expense of their duty to this country... must at some level realize that
they squander the sacrifice and example of service we have all inherited
as Americans. And unless they change course, they may find themselves
responsible for the loss of this singular exception to the rule of human
history: a government that aspires to be of the people, by the people and
for the people.

Now that articles of impeachment have been presented to Congress, it is up
to every one of us to apply maximum pressure on our elected
representatives to do the right thing by holding the President to account.
To remind them of our country’s history, of their sworn duty to defend the
Constitution, and the need to follow the facts and impeach the President,
whatever the personal or political cost.

A resounding vote for impeachment, joined by Democrats and Republicans,
puts the country first and helps set an example for Senators of both
parties to do the right thing in the trial that will follow.

Members of Congress who show courage and sacrifice, including Republicans
who defy their leader in favor of their country, will long be remembered
for saving this country when it needed it most. Maybe even memorialized in
a painting depicting their sacrifice that could hang in the Capitol in
years to come, offering another “high moral lesson” for future
generations.

If we fail, we replace the precedent of Washington with that of Trump.
Sacrifice and service replaced with corruption. And I guarantee you, not
only would that failure embolden Trump to continue to defy the
Constitution and invite more foreign involvement in our elections — it
will almost certainly mean that future Presidents will feel free to do the
same.

This country... any future we have as a democracy... depends on all of us
doing the right thing at this defining moment of truth.

Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191211footer&t=1001&refcode2=72447_444211_WAyMFP&akid=72447%2E444211%2EWAyMFP

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=72447%2E444211%2EWAyMFP

P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This will be a short note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President

We've got just a few weeks before our final FEC deadline of the year. And shortly after that, people across the country will start getting out to caucus and vote in the Democratic primary. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b103/45c30650/112cfa359/66f8eafa/2144305746/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

This will be a short note, and I'll get right to the chase: I'd be grateful if you could make your first donation today. Here's why I'm asking:

We've got just a few weeks before our final FEC deadline of the year. And shortly after that, people across the country will start getting out to caucus and vote in the Democratic primary.

The grassroots donations we raise this quarter will go directly into the field to help continue to grow our campaign as we enter 2020. We've set some pretty ambitious goals for this FEC deadline, because we're ambitious about the work we're going to need to do as we enter the final stretch of this primary election.

**We've spent the past year building a grassroots movement to fight for working people. This is a moment when we need to give it our all.**

[**I can't thank you enough for everything you do as a member of this team, and I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important. Will you make your first donation today to power the next phase of this campaign?**](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM46F_EGR_GRM_E_20191211_V1S2_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode=EMM46F_EGR_GRM_E_20191211_V1S2_P_T2)

Peter,

I wanted to make sure you saw this important new development in our race.

[**We have a big opportunity to win this race but need your support right now. With the days counting down to election day, there isn't much time left to chip in.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12766709/131720139/-930450309?refcode=em121119&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzcyOTU1ZC02NjFjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OV28kT7RlosiczT8tKmbpp-Y1Ma3onxdtcOTOVohojQ=)

Briana Burns
Campaign Manager

* * *

Friend, We’ve received some big news in this race that has exposed the record of my opponent in the Democratic primary.

**Shannon Hutcheson voted Republican in a critical year for Obamacare, donated to Republicans, worked on behalf of corporations hurting working people, represented private prisons that are facilitating family separation, and protected a prison guard who sexually assaulted migrant women in detention. Now, ****Hutcheson is challenging me for the Democratic nomination.**

[**Today, more than ever, I need your support so we can win this crucial race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12766710/131720140/-930450309?refcode=em121119&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzcyOTU1ZC02NjFjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OV28kT7RlosiczT8tKmbpp-Y1Ma3onxdtcOTOVohojQ=)

I have spent my career fighting for people as a public servant, first as a public school teacher and union organizer, and then as a civil rights lawyer, fighting for at-risk students, mistreated workers, immigrant families and people looking for housing.

**I don’t think the distinction could be more clear.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12766711/131720141/-930450309?refcode=em121119&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzcyOTU1ZC02NjFjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OV28kT7RlosiczT8tKmbpp-Y1Ma3onxdtcOTOVohojQ=)
**We need someone who will bring a real alternative to the GOP’s anti-worker and anti-immigrant agenda — not further it.**

When I was an Assistant City Attorney for the City of Austin, I sued to strike down Texas’ Senate Bill 4, an anti-immigrant, “show-me-your-papers” bill. When I ran for Congress in 2018, I successfully fought to update the Texas Democratic Party platform — to include a strong opposition to private immigration jails.

Here’s the thing: Hutcheson has been able to raise a lot of money because of her wealthy corporate connections. She hopes to cover up her record as a corporate attorney with TV ads and direct mail. This makes it even more important that we build a massive grassroots movement for political change.

**[This is our moment. I need your support now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12766712/131720142/-930450309?refcode=em121119&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzcyOTU1ZC02NjFjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OV28kT7RlosiczT8tKmbpp-Y1Ma3onxdtcOTOVohojQ=)**

Fighting for you,
Mike Siegel

clean_body: Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw this important new development in our race. = Briana Burns Campaign Manager Friend, We’ve received some big news in this race that has exposed the record of my opponent in the Democratic primary. Shannon Hutcheson voted Republican in a critical year for Obamacare, donated to Republicans, worked on behalf of corporations hurting working people, represented private prisons that are facilitating family separation, and protected a prison guard who sexually assaulted migrant women in detention. Now, **Hutcheson is challenging me for the Democratic nomination. = I have spent my career fighting for people as a public servant, first as a public school teacher and union organizer, and then as a civil rights lawyer, fighting for at-risk students, mistreated workers, immigrant families and people looking for housing. I don’t think the distinction could be more clear. = We need someone who will bring a real alternative to the GOP’s anti-worker and anti-immigrant agenda — not further it. When I was an Assistant City Attorney for the City of Austin, I sued to strike down Texas’ Senate Bill 4, an anti-immigrant, “show-me-your-papers” bill. When I ran for Congress in 2018, I successfully fought to update the Texas Democratic Party platform — to include a strong opposition to private immigration jails. Here’s the thing: Hutcheson has been able to raise a lot of money because of her wealthy corporate connections. She hopes to cover up her record as a corporate attorney with TV ads and direct mail. This makes it even more important that we build a massive grassroots movement for political change. = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: USMCA is Trump's Vision (Not Pelosi's) -- and a Shining Example of Promises Made, Promises Kept
body:
"Remember that Pelosi, along with more than 100 other Democrats, voted for the North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA) in 1993." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c6f0f80fea&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **USMCA is Trump's Vision (Not Pelosi's) -- and a Shining Example of Promises Made, Promises Kept**

“Remember that Pelosi, along with more than 100 other Democrats, voted for the North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA) in 1993. In sharp contrast, there should be no mistake about this: Donald Trump was a NAFTA critic from the get-go,” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes in Fox Business.

“The USMCA is President Trump’s vision”—one that, for example, “will restore North America as the strategic and global hub of automobile manufacturing – and act as a counterweight to the unfair trade practices of both Asian and European automakers.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ea2d16379&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| The Horowitz Justice Department report is “a story about bad journalism piled on bad journalism, balanced on a third layer of wrong reporting. Steele in his ‘reports’ embellished his sources’ quotes, played up nonexistent angles, invented attributions, and ignored inconsistencies. The FBI then transplanted this bad reporting in the form of a warrant,” Matt Taibbi writes in the [_Rolling Stone_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2935dcdd82&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Monday’s Justice Department Inspector General report on the FBI’s Trump -Russia probe is illuminating in many ways, not least the light it casts on the previous claims by politicians when they were telling the public about what they saw in classified documents. House Intelligence Chairman Adam Schiff in particular has been exposed for distortions and falsehoods,” [_The Wall Street Journal_ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3a82cbec9&e=3ee4985eea)editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) is rushing the impeachment vote to the floor of the House before the Christmas recess to keep wavering Democrats in key battleground districts away from their constituents, the majority of whom are potentially uncomfortable with impeaching the president,” Michael Patrick Leahy writes for _[Breitbart](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8fabf17ffd&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.breitbart.com/politics/2019/12/10/pelosi-rushing-impeachment-vote-to-keep-wavering-democrats-in-line-before-christmas-recess/")_.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=01a4f69bc0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2a34900b86&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=48a25c11e6)

body:

| | | | | |

| Friend,
The Democrats have never been able to accept President Trump's election victory and have been on an impeachment witch hunt since Day 1.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oFusTxIKqoF89Cj2rpQWLjxWkB6GFHcTu8dcVgKAWRNWCyQ_jJB0fvnY-ka9asV55CqXY_LUd-F2Ah-A8SmTHW9XQRcJZpap_JflPHe99EX9qmwmpNlc0eBDWHjYQZXavfaJ30Fp5CvQnRtdU8icSIiHiXgEUu3rUtBP8ytWmU3OzrXDNe2WQOsPebfGVrb6&c=FnJx4-E1FrJ8JwNC0zHnkQM-d8mZ9Qak3vR2ROmjWs1f12IFezLAmA==&ch=0M86Nm2KM9HB6-o3Qt6ax5lsCHnrx8BNaluExyL36ffNI6A8A3rcSw==)

[Join me today in telling the Democrats you support President Trump.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oFusTxIKqoF89Cj2rpQWLjxWkB6GFHcTu8dcVgKAWRNWCyQ_jJB0fvnY-ka9asV55CqXY_LUd-F2Ah-A8SmTHW9XQRcJZpap_JflPHe99EX9qmwmpNlc0eBDWHjYQZXavfaJ30Fp5CvQnRtdU8icSIiHiXgEUu3rUtBP8ytWmU3OzrXDNe2WQOsPebfGVrb6&c=FnJx4-E1FrJ8JwNC0zHnkQM-d8mZ9Qak3vR2ROmjWs1f12IFezLAmA==&ch=0M86Nm2KM9HB6-o3Qt6ax5lsCHnrx8BNaluExyL36ffNI6A8A3rcSw==)
The bipartisan opposition to this witch hunt shows how baseless these charges are.
Liberals refuse to acknowledge that he has driven our economy to an unemployment rate of 3.5%. The lowest rate in 50 years.

For New Mexico,

subject: I won't be naïve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | There are some candidates in this race who believe, or at least claim, that they can persuade Congressional Republicans and Mitch McConnell to pass their agenda.
They forget eight years where Republicans stonewalled everything Barack Obama did. They forget that Republicans who took an oath to defend the constitution are protecting Donald Trump as we speak. **Our next president can 't have any illusions--we'll have to fight to pass our agenda.** If you believe that with the right words and with watered-down proposals on health care, immigration, and climate change, Congressional Republicans will magically agree with you - you shouldn't be leading the fight against Donald Trump. [Donate Today](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a7/3eb3e2fc/69528947/744d1835/1145645819/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Donate+Today&utm_campaign=20191211_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191211_em_fr_b1_castro_all")
**If we want change, we 're going to have to fight for it. It's about not just winning back the presidency, it's about exciting a new generation of voters and rebuilding the coalition that has elected Democrats in every important election.** As president, I'm going to work across the aisle to build consensus and get things done. But I won't be naive about the challenges, or sacrifice my principles to get there. With the right candidate, we can ignite a coalition to take back the White House, win the Senate, and expand our control in the House. And together, wish Donald Trump "adios" next January. **And we 're going to do it together.** [Chip in right now to a campaign that is ready to fight. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

clean_body: | | | | | | | There are some candidates in this race who believe, or at least claim, that they can persuade Congressional Republicans and Mitch McConnell to pass their agenda. They forget eight years where Republicans stonewalled everything Barack Obama did. They forget that Republicans who took an oath to defend the constitution are protecting Donald Trump as we speak. Our next president can 't have any illusions--we'll have to fight to pass our agenda. If you believe that with the right words and with watered-down proposals on health care, immigration, and climate change, Congressional Republicans will magically agree with you - you shouldn't be leading the fight against Donald Trump. "" If we want change, we 're going to have to fight for it. It's about not just winning back the presidency, it's about exciting a new generation of voters and rebuilding the coalition that has elected Democrats in every important election. As president, I'm going to work across the aisle to build consensus and get things done. But I won't be naive about the challenges, or sacrifice my principles to get there. With the right candidate, we can ignite a coalition to take back the White House, win the Senate, and expand our control in the House. And together, wish Donald Trump "adios" next January. And we 're going to do it together. "" "" "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, Julian | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. | Peter,
Can you believe the Democrats have actually gone ahead and filed impeachment charges against President Trump? This is a thinly veiled attempt to rally Democrat support heading into an election year.
The Socialist Democrats in Washington are desperate to get rid of President Trump because they know that none of their Democratic Presidential candidates can win the 2020 election. But I know the American people won't be distracted from noticing the fact that this country is on a roll.

* We now have record high employment
* Wages are rising
* China is being held accountable
* The stock market is at an all-time high
* We are making progress securing the border

clean_body: | | | | Democracy works best when all of our voices are heard, friend. That’s why, last week, Tom called on the Democratic National Committee to open up its debate requirements so voters can hear from a diverse group of candidates before selecting a nominee. When Tom started his campaign, he made diversity, equity, and inclusivity a top priority because he knows from experience that teams are more successful when they’re diverse. But it goes beyond just our team — diversity is a source of strength in our party and our country. If the Democrats want to win back the White House, we must engage voters in every community and every part of this country. Changing these requirements will provide a more equitable opportunity for candidates to participate. This Democratic primary is about more than any one campaign. It’s about finding the best possible person to defeat Donald Trump in 2020. Together, Tom 2020 | | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! name: Tracy Newman
subject: Checking our numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
It's time to have Jay's back.
| | [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8285?t=3&akid=8006%2E868730%2EqYhG1m) | [CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8285?t=4&akid=8006%2E868730%2EqYhG1m)
---
Friend,
Since we're about to head into this more than 90-day fundraising freeze, we're closely checking our records.
[**Today, we're still $16,491 away from our critical fundraising goal. So I have to ask: Will you take a big step and show Jay we've got his back with a donation?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8285?t=5&akid=8006%2E868730%2EqYhG1m)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8286?t=6&akid=8006%2E868730%2EqYhG1m)

When the Republican Governors Association is watching this race so closely and they have tens of millions of dollars in the bank, they're celebrating this fundraising freeze big time.
There is no better time to make a grassroots donation than right now -- if for no other reason than you literally can't (for many months!) after Friday's deadline. We have to raise $50,000 by Friday, and we're getting closer -- but we're not there yet.
[**Donate $1 or more today to support Jay this holiday season before we're frozen -- our deadline is Friday at midnight!**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8285?t=12&akid=8006%2E868730%2EqYhG1m)
Thanks,
Tracy Newman
Senior Advisor
Inslee for Washington

body:

****
**🚨 House Democrats Announce Articles of Impeachment Against Trump 🚨** _****

"The Judiciary Committee plans to vote on the articles on Thursday, setting up a vote on the House floor next week to make Trump the third president in history to be impeached. The markup will be the last major step before the House votes to formally impeach Trump."_
\- POLITICO, December 10, 2019
__

****[**STAND WITH TRUMP**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDEzMTE2NTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTA0NzkzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

****
They're this close to impeaching President Trump, Peter.
****
We 've known since election night 2016 that the Left would do everything in their power to obstruct the conservative agenda and remove President Trump from office. House Democrats have staged one of the most outrageous examples of political theater over the past year, forfeiting doing the people's work to drag the Trump Administration and conservatives through the mud.
**
_Marsha has authorized **EMERGENCY 3X MATCHING** for every proud conservative who stands with President Trump today. _**
****
********
Make a contribution to show your support for Trump and the conservative agenda before the match expires at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.
** **
****

****
The Left's attacks, their baseless, biased sham of an investigation, will all come down to this defining moment. The American people sent Donald Trump to the Oval Office to get things done, and he has done nothing but deliver on his promises to the American people. It's important now more than ever to step up and show our president that we stand with him in a united front against Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff and the scheming Democrats.

President Trump called on Team Marsha to defend the Senate Majority and send Tennessee Values to Washington last year--we didn't let him down _then_ and we don't intend to let him down _now_!
******[**STAND WITH TRUMP**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDEzMTE2NTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTA0NzkzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)******
