name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Nancy Pelosi has made her choice.
body:
This isn't what Iowans want. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=90fad69796&u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=ef34db8a0e)
---
| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=3a3a691154&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=0a6a131d7a&e=90fad69796)
---
| | [Donate $3 Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=02ab8b614f&e=90fad69796 "Donate $3 Now ›")
---
| Peter, Yesterday, Nancy Pelosi filed her articles of impeachment against President Trump.

In classic Swamp fashion they have nothing to do with the crazy conspiracies the left has been pushing for years and are just a capitulation to the far-leftists that have taken over the Democrat Party.

And what does this sham impeachment mean for Iowans? It means that the issues they care about get put on the back-burner to satisfy media elites who hate the president.

That means nothing to help Iowa farmers who are being crushed by unfair trade from China.

That means nothing to fix our broken healthcare system.

That means nothing to make the tax cuts for middle-class Iowans permanent.

And it means nothing to cut our unsustainable spending and prevent our kids and grandkids from suffering when the bill comes due.

**[We desperately need a change in leadership in Washington.](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=6d2abbf1a6&e=90fad69796) **The Democrats had their chance to deliver for the American people and blew it. Winning districts like IA-02 is going to be key to taking back the House in 2020, and that's why we need your help.

[**Please consider donating just $3 to help us ensure that President Trump has a conservative House in 2020 that won't block his agenda at every turn.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=a1f31f02d5&e=90fad69796)

What he has been able to do despite Congress' obstruction has been incredible for Iowa families, imagine what we could do if he actually had a Congress that supports him?

This is a conservative district, it voted for President Trump by 5 points in 2016, and it'll vote for him again, I'm sure of it. We can also elect a congressman that supports his agenda if voters are convinced that he will fight for their interests--that's me.

[**I'm ready to go to the Swamp and fight tooth-and-nail for Iowa families. Please help our campaign get the resources it needs to take the fight to the left and win. Donate $3 or whatever you can today.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=46e9a2a685&e=90fad69796)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We think Stephen Miller needs to be fired. Do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Stephen Miller is a white supremacist, racist immigration policy chief, and toxic conspiracy-pusher who has caused nothing but harm during his time in the White House. His leaked emails from 2015 and 2016 demonstrate the depths of just how twisted he is: In the wake of Dylann Roof murdering nine black churchgoers in Charleston, Miller emailed about how upset he was that Amazon and other retailers were reacting by ending the sale of Confederate flags from their sites. In another thread, Miller pushed immigration policies based off of the race-based 1920s U.S. immigration laws that Hitler praised in _Mein Kampf_. In yet another thread, Miller recommended Breitbart write a story relating current immigration issues to an obscure racist novel popular among neo-Nazis that pushes claims of "white genocide" and depicts Indian immigrants as violent rapists. [**If you agree that this is completely abhorrent and unacceptable behavior that doesn 't belong anywhere near the White House, add your name to ours on this petition calling for Miller to be fired.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcab/6e9863e8/1704d7f5/1db0b55a/629938257/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stephen-miller-resign/wdtop/") Thank you for adding your voice. name: Team Monika
subject: The road ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is our last deadline before the primary date.

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d936/7dfbb003/42a89e51/5527ba13/1381404878/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline&source=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline")
---
Friend,

We are poised to take back the House in North Carolina's 2nd District in 2020. With the new district lines, NC-02 is more likely to flip blue than ever!

But we are in a crowded primary, and when we flip the 2nd District, we must ensure it's Monika representing us there. Monika is the most qualified person for the job:
* We've seen Monika lead this campaign with integrity, intention, and an attitude of service--exactly the way she plans to advocate for us all in Congress.
* She has spent the last twenty years advocating for thousands of women and children. Congress needs less politicians... and more advocates.
* She is currently serving her third term on the Board of Education for one of the LARGEST school districts in the country.

**We are staying focused on the primary date: March 3, 2020.** But the end of this month--December 31--is our very last major fundraising deadline before voters make their first decisions.

**This month is our last call to you to be counted on Monika's team before the final pre-primary FEC deadline.**

[**We've got a tough road ahead of us. Will you help us raise the funds we need to tell more voters about Monika's vision for the 2nd District?**](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d936/7dfbb003/42a89e51/5527ba10/1381404878/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+Weve+got+a+tough+road+ahead+of+us+Will+y&utm_campaign=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline&source=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5»](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d936/7dfbb003/42a89e51/5527ba11/1381404878/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline&recurring=auto&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=3+-+5raquo&utm_campaign=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline&source=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline")

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: We need to generate as many donations as possible to show everyone that the people are with Ed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We have our biggest FEC deadline so far at the end of this month. | |
---
| Friends -

We have our biggest FEC deadline so far at the end of this month.

We'll have to publicly report how much we raised afterward, and political insiders and our opponents are going to pick apart these numbers.

They want to try to see if Ed is vulnerable. They think we're not up for the fight.

We need your help to prove them wrong:

**[Make a $3 donation to our campaign today to help us demonstrate our grassroots strength heading into 2020. We need to make it clear to everyone that the people are behind Ed.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df35/693b8b0a/438f3858/72de7c9f/396974934/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191211-full")**

Ed has never shied away from fighting for our shared values. Whether it's climate change, net neutrality, nuclear policy, or this campaign, Ed consistently leads -- and he wins.

But here's the truth: He cannot win any of these fights alone.

He understands that no one person can win these battles. We need a movement of people behind us to defeat those who want to challenge our progressive agenda. Together we can accomplish so much more than anyone thinks possible.

There's never been a more important moment for our democracy. Now is not the time for us to back down. We need everyone in our movement to step up -- including you.

**[Can Ed count on you to make a $3 donation right now? It'll send a powerful message that we have what it takes to win this fight.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df35/693b8b0a/438f3858/72de7c9f/396974934/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191211-full")**

This deadline is a big one. All eyes are on our campaign, so thanks for having our backs at this critical moment.

\- Team Markey **[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df35/693b8b0a/438f3858/72de7c9f/396974934/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191211-full")**

subject: TONIGHT: Articles of impeachment are being marked up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
What the Democrats are doing to our President and the American people is unfair and completely biased. Despite this, they continue to forge ahead. Tonight, the Judiciary Committee will mark up the articles of impeachment, and they will finish the process tomorrow.
President Trump needs our help ASAP! We need to stop this process before the articles of impeachment are sent to the entire House, where the radical Democrats are sure to vote "yes" on impeachment.
Join me as I search for the truth and defend our President.

We need to stop this process before the articles of impeachment are sent to the entire House, where the radical Democrats are sure to vote "yes" on impeachment. Join me as I search for the truth and defend our President. | | | == | Monday's impeachment hearing was nothing more than the Democrats 'Bring your donor to work' Day. The Democrats brought in their donors as witnesses instead of bringing in Adam Schiff to testify. Where I am from, you stand behind your work, and if Adam Schiff really believes that our President should get impeached, then HE needs to show up and answer our questions. Until we can question him, only Adam Schiff knows the type of contact with the whistleblower and anything done outside the bounds of the law. | | | == | | | God bless President Trump, | | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2019 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website. Friends of Matt Gaetz | == | | Friends of Matt Gaetz | PO Box 168, Mary Ester, FL 32569 | | Sent by mailto:info@mattgaetzforflorida.com

| | With news that Billionaire Michael Bloomberg has now spent more than $100M buying TV ads, with fellow Billionaire Tom Steyer right behind him - plus a number of other Democrats outspending even Donald Trump - **it begs the question, what is the price of the Presidency?**
[I didn't start this race with millions in a Senate committee to transfer over, or a giant email list. We're building this grassroots campaign from the ground up, and we need your help. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a8/3eb3e2fc/69581a55/744d1b17/1897456262/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+I+didnrsquot+start+this+race+with+millio&utm_campaign=20191211_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191211_em_fr_b2_castro_all") It's outrageous that the each of us non-billionaires in the democratic field, who have been running for nearly a year, are being outspent more than 10 times over by one man who got in the race a few weeks ago. [We can't outspend them, but we must fight back. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a8/3eb3e2fc/69581a55/744d1b16/1897456262/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A Thanks,
Julian

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a8/3eb3e2fc/69581a55/744d1b1b/1897456262/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191211_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191211_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a8/3eb3e2fc/69581a55/744d1b1a/1897456262/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191211_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191211_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a8/3eb3e2fc/69581a55/744d1b19/1897456262/VEsHAA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=20191211_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191211_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

Corporate PACs and billionaire donors write checks to Mitch McConnell’s campaign with far more zeros than that. That’s not the kind of operation Charles is running. name: WOW (via NikkiFosterOH.com)
subject: "clear and present danger"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
---
| | If you're looking for a clear and concise summary of the findings of the impeachment inquiry, here it is: President Trump's persistent and continuing effort to coerce a foreign country to help him cheat to win an election is a clear and present danger to our free and fair elections and to our national security. -- Daniel S. Goldman, counsel for the House Intelligence Committee. We have people who courageously go overseas, putting their lives on the line to protect and defend our national interests. And then we have the Commander in Chief, brazenly attempting to influence our elections for his own gain. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - If you're looking for a clear and concise summary of the findings of the impeachment inquiry, **here it is:** [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_hearings?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191211_Hearings4_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191211_Hearings4_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191211_Hearings4_U2_X1") We have people who courageously go overseas, putting their lives on the line to protect and defend our national interests. **And then we have the Commander in Chief, brazenly attempting to influence our elections for his own gain.** Donald Trump's actions are dangerous to our democracy -- and extreme Republicans are watching unbothered as it happens. name: polling@dga.net
subject: re: impeachment (your response is needed)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Team, Republicans continue to defend Donald Trump's every action, no matter how hateful or disgraceful. They're doing everything in their power to confuse and deceive the American people to keep the president in office.

**As outrageous as these lies are, they might be working.** FiveThirtyEight reports that the impeachment hearings aren't swaying Trump's approval rating, and America is still sharply divided about impeachment.
With so much false information out there, we wanted to reach out directly to Democrats like you, Team, to get your opinion on impeachment. Please, tell us what you think of Trump's conduct:
| | [Trump did nothing wrong](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTY3MDMzOTIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDc4MTU5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: BREAKING: The Senate is walking into a vote right now on whether to confirm anti-LGBT nominee Lawrence VanDyke as a federal judge.
body:
He's unqualified and too extreme.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fc8/4bef7a87/6a7332f3/287fee18/18018421/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**The Senate is walking into a vote right now on whether to confirm Lawrence VanDyke as a federal judge.**
This is the same man who once wrote an op-ed claiming there was "ample reason for concern that same-sex marriage will hurt families, and consequentially children and society."
He asked the Supreme Court to "revisit" _Roe v. Wade_ and even represented the Alliance Defending Freedom, a right-wing organization that defended proposed laws to _criminalize_ same-sex relationships.
**[Sign our urgent petition: Tell Senator Collins to vote NO on VanDyke's confirmation.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fc8/4bef7a87/6a7332f3/287fee1f/18018421/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/petition-vandyke?source=em191211-1-a")**
******[SIGN THE PETITION](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fc8/4bef7a87/6a7332f3/287fee1f/18018421/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/petition-vandyke?source=em191211-1-a")******
VanDyke is completely unqualified and too extreme for the Federal bench. **[Sign our petition if you agree.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fc8/4bef7a87/6a7332f3/287fee1f/18018421/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/petition-vandyke?source=em191211-1-a")**
\- Team Sara

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

clean_body: He's unqualified and too extreme. "" The Senate is walking into a vote right now on whether to confirm Lawrence VanDyke as a federal judge. This is the same man who once wrote an op-ed claiming there was "ample reason for concern that same-sex marriage will hurt families, and consequentially children and society." He asked the Supreme Court to "revisit" Roe v. Wade and even represented the Alliance Defending Freedom, a right-wing organization that defended proposed laws to criminalize same-sex relationships. "" **** ""** VanDyke is completely unqualified and too extreme for the Federal bench. "" \- Team Sara Sara Gideon for Maine PO Box 812 South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Yesterday's hearings on universal health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390964/55b66746/2d630c3f/80f0bed/3273760704/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | On January 25, 1971 my uncle, Sen. Ted Kennedy, took to the Senate floor to argue for a national health insurance program -- or single-payer system. It was the first legislative day of the 92nd Congress. Democrats had the majority. Richard Nixon was president. And our country's health care system was, as my uncle put it: _"The fastest-growing failing business in the nation -- a $70 billion industry that fails to meet the urgent needs of our people."_ Our people were paying more than any other developed nation for worse care, he said. They were getting sicker, dying younger--and spending an extraordinary amount of money on a system that wasn't taking care of them. Sound familiar? Take a look: In 1971, the United States ranked seventh in maternal mortality rates. Now, we're number 46. In 1971, we had the 13th lowest infant mortality rate in the world. Now, we're 35th. Then: people of color in the U.S. were about five times more likely to die in childbirth than white folks. That hasn't changed. Then: health care spending at $70 billion was more than 7 percent of our gross domestic product. Now? $3.5 trillion and about 18 percent. **Nearly fifty years later and the injustice, inequity and inadequacy of our health care system has only grown. **Fifty years later, and we're no better than where we were in 1971. We're worse. That's not acceptable. Have we made strides? Yes. The Affordable Care Act was an enormous leap forward. But we need more. We need to rethink and rebuild the entire system. We need the kind of universal, public insurance coverage that my uncle knew was the answer, all the way back in 1971. **We need Medicare for All.** Yesterday the House Committee on Energy & Commerce finally held hearings on the path towards universal coverage.I was proud to speak in support of Medicare for All, which I believe is the best option on the table for the kind of bold, comprehensive and sustainable reform our system needs. Health care was the fight of my uncle's life. He knew reform would never be quick and rarely linear. Over the years, he compromised, he analyzed and debated, collaborated, convinced and cajoled -- he fought like hell. **We carry on that fight today. For a system that is there for all in our moments of deepest need. For a country that sees the value in every single human life. For a future where each of us can do the one thing that matters most of all: take care of the people we love.** Proud to fight at your side, Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390964/55b66746/2d630c3f/80f0bee/3273760704/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-12-10-mfa&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390964/55b66746/2d630c3f/80f0bef/3273760704/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-12-10-mfa&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390964/55b66746/2d630c3f/80f0be8/3273760704/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-12-10-mfa&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390964/55b66746/2d630c3f/80f0be9/3273760704/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-12-10-mfa&refcode2=express-buttons")

Peter,

After our huge endorsements last week, I knew our fight for Upstate New York was gaining attention, but I had no idea how much.

**Today, I’m excited to announce that I’ve been endorsed by House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy.**
|

[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=a86977f5442a4bf9b5fc52ccd6b2a84f&_e=U9z9K6DVE-YjRwY30f7TgyqSSO8Cf-e4u5ggyxG6gohvTGEQNtMa73pn7K9s1R9bq3Mh1TH0zLmBYPkP0_T8ftGTAMXfsdkvTIGaSL2ItGmXy3L6tPdDUR_C9v20WkyTZ4lffbJRG5rEXQmNO86fPb4cRNH_m3Jon9bEJzpntHS66nd5fDVTWIW57XCbiMntYFFGYQ5UOQrtB2T5lDRwXIaMNU0PqSvts7dLuvzzw_in-z1RbbnbNE7EPvrPBv2ea2qcaAbLGv7HhyTQU-0ReH3R54v7YtAWYenY0C-EBkdrTQtTO_yyrA0UF_7nsZQfVj1mh3InoUqG0iOVLueXpCxoWnaAuBCCKv_dPo9gYf_beYjKX_4EyHAcFqrTQwkcoKGzIvMb9kVgdjGNs0oud4sT454MCU90RfSGlePZtfykGSbF7kV8QMysJ7Zk8sfI)
|
---
As Minority Leader, Kevin McCarthy has been holding House Democrats accountable in their baseless witch hunt against President Trump. He has a proven track record of delivering real results for this country.

**We need to keep up the momentum from this huge endorsement. Chip in before midnight TONIGHT to help us continue our fight against Anthony Brindisi.**
[**CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=a86977f5442a4bf9b5fc52ccd6b2a84f&_e=U9z9K6DVE-YjRwY30f7TgyqSSO8Cf-e4u5ggyxG6gohvTGEQNtMa73pn7K9s1R9bq3Mh1TH0zLmBYPkP0_T8ftGTAMXfsdkvTIGaSL2ItGmXy3L6tPdDUR_C9v20WkyTZ4lffbJRG5rEXQmNO86fPb4cRNH_m3Jon9bEJzpntHS66nd5fDVTWIW57XCbiMntYFFGYQ5UOQrtB2T5lDRwXIaMNU0PqSvts7dLuvzzw_hoNTEu1smyr57vIbRnHVV4iYCDwOWOFvOl4clcCcTV0Kha9pY5bMXTL435me_GKQNE3hWQUhxT5rMrQAHhSBU_eaoFa0irHK5oiU8F05AF2HelqWLAz-jes4LIG90v4z5m7F8wdMqgu5PHEMQGEqMZXl2noaUxOpQjJyi-5e_Dsm2-5t6elijGU-LgbFuAuoisXZTdzLtscklWRXwHNQid)
Kevin McCarthy endorsed me because he knows I have what it takes to win this top-tier race. As your Congresswoman, I fought to lower taxes, reduce burdensome regulations, and deliver real results for Upstate New Yorkers.

Now that I’ve got this endorsement, we’re sure that Brindisi and his political cronies will start increasing their attacks on me and our campaign. I refuse to back down, but I need your help. He’s relying on the liberal media and out-of-state donors to win this election, but I’m relying on you, Peter.

**Now, I need your help to fight back. Chip in to my campaign to combat Anthony’s liberal dark money machine.**
[ **CHIP IN NOW** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=a86977f5442a4bf9b5fc52ccd6b2a84f&_e=U9z9K6DVE-YjRwY30f7TgyqSSO8Cf-e4u5ggyxG6gohvTGEQNtMa73pn7K9s1R9bq3Mh1TH0zLmBYPkP0_T8ftGTAMXfsdkvTIGaSL2ItGmXy3L6tPdDUR_C9v20WkyTZ4lffbJRG5rEXQmNO86fPb4cRNH_m3Jon9bEJzpntHS66nd5fDVTWIW57XCbiMntYFFGYQ5UOQrtB2T5lDRwXIaMNU0PqSvts7dLuvzzw_h-PBqWqM1PWckwqiy6mGUoyglK7g4h3ouTP2_ghBpUci70WMmCNJHB0PF_ejJBGzYyddnY56YZtw1yD-MXFKIxm7Ghk3kzuNAqrbiivo6ywSEfjAO23q8qzUJ5wFdl-YjiOf8VHXVDC37xbmLjbToaR4yyjRCRRXMLDaeQJTA_1_zDpxrEGkawDgXjfK2YFq5DnZ39Fb5NLtR9QeUujF5J)
With your help, we can build off this huge endorsement by Kevin and fight back against Anthony Brindisi’s disastrous policies.

Thanks for your support,

Claudia Tenney

name: Mark Warner
subject: Join me in calling for Mr. Barr's resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The Attorney General's habit of substituting partisan spin for the facts has undermined whatever credibility he brought to the job, and I think the American people deserve better.
|
---
| | Derek,

This week, the Department of Justice released a long-awaited report into the origins of the Russia investigation. Contrary to what President Trump and his allies have been claiming for three years, the report found no evidence that the investigation -- which exposed criminal activity by the President's campaign manager, national security adviser, and other top aides -- was influenced by political bias.

But you wouldn't know that from listening to Attorney General Bill Barr. Yesterday, Mr. Barr went on national television and, instead of accepting the findings of a non-partisan, two-year investigation, proceeded to attack the men and women of federal law enforcement, mislead the American people, and try to provide political cover for the President.

Frankly, the Attorney General's habit of substituting partisan spin for the facts has undermined whatever credibility he brought to the job, and I think the American people deserve better. I've called on the Attorney General to resign before, but this latest attempt to rewrite history makes it even more clear we need new leadership in the Justice Department.

**[If you agree, will you sign my petition and join me in calling for Attorney General Barr's resignation today?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d75d/53d9897e/53e10a41/1c89f47f/104533183/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-barrresign")** **[Sign My Petition >>>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d75d/53d9897e/53e10a41/1c89f47f/104533183/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-barrresign")** I was one of the first Senators to oppose Attorney General Barr's nomination because our nation's top law enforcement officer has a responsibility to defend the rule of law, not the personal interests of the President.

Time and again, the Attorney General has failed to live up to that standard. I think the American people deserve better. If you agree, I hope you'll add your name and join me in calling for Mr. Barr's resignation.

Sincerely,
Mark Warner | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d75d/53d9897e/53e10a41/1c89f47e/104533183/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191211_p_1_fl__383__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d75d/53d9897e/53e10a41/1c89f47d/104533183/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: John Delaney
subject: Medicare for All will cost us this election. Here's why:

| [ ](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b90153/30fd46cd/32cec1fc/2354e4e5/3736647868/VEsH/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=1+-+++&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.12.11_e1_jkd_healthcare_all&source=em_fr_2019.12.11_e1_jkd_healthcare_all") there --

A lot has been said about health care over the course of the Democratic Presidential Primary so far.

**Health care could make or break this election for Democrats.** It's important to me that you know where I stand, so please take a moment to read this:

Like my fellow candidates, I also believe health care is a fundamental human right.

**That 's the underlying premise of BetterCare, my plan to provide universal, quality health care coverage for all Americans.**

BetterCare guarantees that every single American has health coverage by:
1. offering a free public insurance plan to _everyone_ under age 65; and
2. by strengthening Medicare to support everyone over 65.

Unlike many of my fellow candidates who are continuing to push "Medicare for All," my plan offers the option to opt out of BetterCare for a private health insurance policy.

**And unlike "Medicare for All", this plan works.** It won't bankrupt our hospitals and it gives you the choice to control your own health care.

_But to keep beating the drum on this critical issue, we need your help._

**Health care is too important in this election to get it wrong. Please make a donation right now to keep our health care agenda front and center:** | | | [Donate $15 »](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.11_e1_jkd_healthcare_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=1,5,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=2+-+Donate+15nbspraquo&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.12.11_e1_jkd_healthcare_all&source=em_fr_2019.12.11_e1_jkd_healthcare_all")

---
Our plan is the most practical way to achieve universal health care coverage in America. Let's go through some of the basics:

**First, can we afford it?** Yes! My BetterCare plan is fully paid for without requiring massive tax increases.

In addition to redirecting our current health care spending, my plan would allow the federal government to negotiate with pharmaceutical companies for lower drug costs (like most major developed countries already do), which could save nearly $850 billion. This is a critical piece of my health care plan, because it makes no sense why Americans pay so much more for medications than people around the world.

**Second, why keep private insurance?** There are quite a few reasons why we should allow private insurance to stay in the mix, but most importantly it gives families more control over the health care they receive.

If you're unhappy with the free federal health insurance plan, you can supplement it with the plan of your choice.

On top of that, it will keep our hospital system solvent by boosting their overall reimbursement rates. The "Medicare for All" plan risks forcing hospitals to close by keeping reimbursement rates the same, which are significantly lower for patients on Medicare than for those on a private insurance plan.

Because at the root of all of this is making sure that the plan we migrate to has to work. It has to be able to pay for itself, and it has to keep our hospitals and doctor offices open.

**Getting this wrong could cost Democrats the election. We can 't afford to let that happen. If you agree, please donate to my campaign today:**

---
BetterCare is our best option because it's more than just talking points. It's a practical and real solution to America's health care crisis.

**It works because it gets everyone insured from birth -- with no premiums or tax hikes (unlike "Medicare for All").**

It works for America's small businesses struggling to afford rising premiums. It works for medical professionals who won't be able to keep their practices running on Medicare reimbursement rates alone. And it works for individuals who want to be able to switch jobs, start a new business, or just generally want the security of knowing they have health insurance, no matter what state they live in or what their income level is.

Americans deserve to get the health care coverage that they both want and need. A plan that's a big idea that we can turn into real action to create a more prosperous, more secure, and more just future for every American.

**If you 're with John in this fight, then please pitch in $15 now:**

**[https://go.johndelaney.com/Donate](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.11_e1_jkd_healthcare_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=1,5,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=14+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomDonate&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.12.11_e1_jkd_healthcare_all&source=em_fr_2019.12.11_e1_jkd_healthcare_all")**

Thanks for hearing me out,
John

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Billionaires stepping in to keep the Senate red
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Susan Collins voted for tax cuts to the wealthy. She voted to put Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court for the rest of his life. And she refuses to hold the president accountable for his actions. Once considered "safe," Susan Collins' seat is now a "toss up" race, according to _The Cook Political Report_. 50% of Mainers disapprove of Collins, while just 35% approve of her performance. Vox says Collins is "in the political fight of her life." And recent polling shows she trails a generic Democratic opponent 44-41. It's no wonder that her billionaire donor friends have launched a $400,000 ad buy to try to bolster her chances, nearly a year before Election Day. Meet Democrat Sara Gideon. She's no "generic Democrat." Sara's a leader in the fight against climate change in Maine, a steadfast supporter of Medicaid expansion and _Roe v. Wade_ , and she's not about to sell out her values for corrupt corporate sponsorship. 97% of her funding comes from donations of $100 or less. We must beat Collins to take back the Senate, so we know Mitch McConnell and the GOP will flood Maine with **millions more** in dark money. But Sara is entirely funded by grassroots donations, so she can only win if engaged Democrats like you support her today. But we're falling $1,328 short of our goal for Sara Gideon this week alone! If we miss this goal, we'll have to scale back our support of Sara, and she won't have a chance against billionaires and the GOP's dark money. If you think politicians should be responsible to the voters and not big corporations and want to see Sara Gideon in the Senate instead of Susan Collins, we need your donation TODAY. [**If you care about getting dark money out of politics, protecting our healthcare access and stopping the nomination of another letting another Brett Kavanaugh-style Supreme Court just, please fight back against Mitch McConnell and Susan Collins by donating anything, even just $5, today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcaf/6e9863e8/17060465/1db0b55f/4004551203/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191211c.ND&refcode2=WisMLThjSaLQqYkjAbXr") Your support is critical. Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcaf/6e9863e8/17060465/1db0b55f/4004551203/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191211c.ND&refcode2=WisMLThjSaLQqYkjAbXr")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: ORTT RECEIVES “A” RATING FROM NYS RIFLE AND PISTOL ASSOCIATION
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| **ORTT RECEIVES “A” RATING FROM NYS RIFLE AND PISTOL ASSOCIATION**
_A press release from Bronze Star recipient and New York State Senator Rob Ortt_ Niagara County, NY --- Today, New York State Senator Rob Ortt, combat veteran, and candidate for New York’s 27th Congressional District announced that he has received an “A” rating from the New York State Rifle and Pistol Association (NYSRPA). NYSRPA is tasked with advocating for and defending the Second Amendment rights of New York’s residents. Each year, they grade legislators on their defense of the constitution’s Second Amendment. Ortt is the only candidate running in the 27th Congressional District to receive this recognition.

“As a proud gun owner, advocate, and defender of our right to keep and bear arms, I am honored to receive this recognition,” said Ortt. “Second Amendment supporters throughout the 27th Congressional District can be certain that I will continue to defend their constitutional freedoms in Washington.”

While serving in the Senate, Ortt has been a fierce advocate for Second Amendment rights and is the sponsor of numerous repeal bills of the NY SAFE Act. He has also continually ranked near the top of the list as the most pro-gun representatives in the New York State Legislature.

Tom King, President of NYSRPA, pointed to Ortt's military service and his record of fighting for the Second Amendment. “Rob has the support of gun owners because he’s always had their backs. As a combat veteran, he’s fought for our freedoms overseas and with his votes and leadership in Albany, he’s proven to be a fierce defender of gun owners. That's why we need someone like him in our nation’s capital – protecting our Second Amendment and standing by our President’s side.”

The “A” rating from NYSRPA follows last week’s announcement of his “100 percent” score from the New York State Conservative Party’s 2019 Legislative Scorecard. For the third time in his five years as a State Legislator, Ortt received a perfect “100 percent” from the state’s Conservative Party.

“Everybody says they are a supporter of the Second Amendment, but I have the record to prove it,” said Ortt. ###
_After the terror attacks on September 11, 2001, Ortt enlisted in the U.S. Army and would serve as a First Lieutenant in Afghanistan during Operation Enduring Freedom. During his service, Ortt would be awarded the Bronze Star, the Army Commendation Medal, the Afghanistan Campaign Medal, and the Combat Infantryman’s Badge. Ortt was also deployed to the U.S. Southern border as part of the recently declassified 2006 Operation Jumpstart, which supported border security and construction of a border fence._

clean_body: | | | | | | | ORTT RECEIVES “A” RATING FROM NYS RIFLE AND PISTOL ASSOCIATION A press release from Bronze Star recipient and New York State Senator Rob Ortt Niagara County, NY --- Today, New York State Senator Rob Ortt, combat veteran, and candidate for New York’s 27th Congressional District announced that he has received an “A” rating from the New York State Rifle and Pistol Association (NYSRPA). NYSRPA is tasked with advocating for and defending the Second Amendment rights of New York’s residents. Each year, they grade legislators on their defense of the constitution’s Second Amendment. Ortt is the only candidate running in the 27th Congressional District to receive this recognition. “As a proud gun owner, advocate, and defender of our right to keep and bear arms, I am honored to receive this recognition,” said Ortt. “Second Amendment supporters throughout the 27th Congressional District can be certain that I will continue to defend their constitutional freedoms in Washington.” While serving in the Senate, Ortt has been a fierce advocate for Second Amendment rights and is the sponsor of numerous repeal bills of the NY SAFE Act. He has also continually ranked near the top of the list as the most pro-gun representatives in the New York State Legislature. Tom King, President of NYSRPA, pointed to Ortt's military service and his record of fighting for the Second Amendment. “Rob has the support of gun owners because he’s always had their backs. As a combat veteran, he’s fought for our freedoms overseas and with his votes and leadership in Albany, he’s proven to be a fierce defender of gun owners. That's why we need someone like him in our nation’s capital – protecting our Second Amendment and standing by our President’s side.” The “A” rating from NYSRPA follows last week’s announcement of his “100 percent” score from the New York State Conservative Party’s 2019 Legislative Scorecard. For the third time in his five years as a State Legislator, Ortt received a perfect “100 percent” from the state’s Conservative Party. “Everybody says they are a supporter of the Second Amendment, but I have the record to prove it,” said Ortt. ### After the terror attacks on September 11, 2001, Ortt enlisted in the U.S. Army and would serve as a First Lieutenant in Afghanistan during Operation Enduring Freedom. During his service, Ortt would be awarded the Bronze Star, the Army Commendation Medal, the Afghanistan Campaign Medal, and the Combat Infantryman’s Badge. Ortt was also deployed to the U.S. Southern border as part of the recently declassified 2006 Operation Jumpstart, which supported border security and construction of a border fence. | "Donate Here" | Missed my campaign launch video? The judge ordered **Trump to pay an eye-popping $2 million in damages,** which he did earlier this week. Add that to the $25 million the president had to pay out to people he duped into attending “Trump University”, and **_the president has paid out $27 million for his illegal business practices._** With that kind of rap sheet, forget running a country, **_we wouldn’t even let Trump run a lemonade stand._** From day one our campaign's message has been clear — **the American people deserve better than a president who lies, cheats, and scams his way to the top**. [**The American people want a principled, fiscally-conservative leader to guide our country through this trying time, and Bill is that leader. If you agree, can you please consider chipping in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us defeat Donald Trump in the 2020 Republican Presidential primary?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22ffbCoi2w_B2S3RTuNKmizztwjH2KFjX68OmdwkNb4ljEkZ1Mi0LpAqE6fN4G5oqc&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191211_fr_s&n=3) | | [SUPPORT BILL ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22ffbCoi2w_B2S3RTuNKmizztwjH2KFjX68OmdwkNb4ljEkZ1Mi0LpAqE6fN4G5oqc&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191211_fr_s&n=4)
